description: Frontend Developer passionate about creating unique web experiences.
aboutText1: I am a Frontend Developer with experience in creating modern web applications.
aboutText2: I am currently focused on improving my skills in React and TypeScript.

experience1.title: Frontend Developer
experience1.description: Development of web and mobile applications using AngularJS and React Native, applying SOLID principles. Participation in large-scale projects and multidisciplinary teamwork.

experience2.title: Web Developer
experience2.description: Web design and development with React.js, SASS, Figma, and GitHub. Application of SOLID principles and collaboration in designing attractive and functional interfaces.

experience3.title: Application Developer
experience3.description: Application development with HTML5, CSS, AngularJS, Vite, and React Native. Use of tools like Canva and application of best development practices.
